items.title: Comcast is splitting in two

items.title: The war against ‘woke’ could end US science as we know it
items.summary: A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there's still time to fight it. On May 29th, the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) issued a 412-page…
